title: Cost-Aware Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimization with Runtime-Gated Cascading Tiers for Autonomous in silico Dermatology Discovery
prior_history: First submission. New v0.1 draft 2026-05-03 describing cost-aware multi-fidelity BO scheduler with runtime-gated cascading tiers; submitted to bioRxiv 2026-05-03.
